products.title: KIREIA 2.0 kW
products.description: Wall-mounted air conditioners available in 7 different power levels (2.00~8.00 kW). Operation in heating and cooling mode with an outdoor temperature limit of -15° C.
products.description_sq: Kondicioneri më kompakt i serisë KIREIA — fuqi 2.0 kW (≈ 7000 BTU), ideal për dhoma 12–18 m² si dhoma gjumi ose zyrë e vogël. Inverter R32 me Wi-Fi të integruar dhe nivel zhurme vetëm 21 dB(A) — më e qetë se një bisedë e ngadaltë.
products.description_en: The smallest model in the KIREIA range — 2.0 kW (~7000 BTU) for rooms of 12–18 m² such as bedrooms or small offices. R32 inverter with integrated Wi-Fi and just 21 dB(A) of sound — quieter than a whispered conversation.
features: Wall-mounted air conditioners available in 7 different power levels (2.00~8.00 kW)
Energy Class: Cool./Heat. A+++/A++ (2.00~3.50 kW), A+/A+ (7.10 kW), A+/A (8.00 kW)
Low acoustic impact: only 21 dB(A) (2.0~2.5 kW)
Particularly high splitting distance: 25 m (5.00 kW)
SRK 71 ZM-S Model can be connected with the Outdoor Unit FDC 71VNP Conter Smart
Operation in heating and cooling mode with an outdoor temperature limit of -15° C
features_sq: Klasa energjie: A+++ / A++ (deri 3.5 kW), A+ / A (5.0–8.0 kW)
Zhurmë minimale: vetëm 21 dB(A) për modelin 2.0–2.5 kW

products.title: KIREIA Plus
products.description: Wall-mounted air conditioners available in 5 different power levels (2.00~6.10 kW). Energy Class: Cool./Heat A+++ (5.00 kW), A++ (2.00~6.10 kW). Low acoustic impact: only 19 dB(A) (2.0 kW). Antibacterial treatment on fan. Modern, elegant design. Operation in heating and cooling mode with an outdoor temperature limit of -15° C.
